## Description
Brief description of changes

## Type of Change
- [ ] :sparkles: New config / feature
- [ ] :bug: Bug fix
- [ ] :memo: Documentation
- [ ] :recycle: Refactor
- [ ] :wrench: Tooling / CI

## Testing
- [ ] `bash -n setup.sh` passes
- [ ] `./setup.sh --dry-run` shows expected steps
- [ ] Manual testing on HyDE completed

## Related Issues
Closes #

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows gitmoji + conventional commit format
- [ ] No secrets exposed
- [ ] README.md updated if adding new configs
